entries.title: humanize-kit
entries.description: AI pattern interrupter for Claude. Three skills — humanize, humanize-ig, voice-profiler — that build a voice fingerprint from your real writing and rewrite AI output to match it. Free + MIT. The free gateway to the paid Branded Mayhem skill lineup (https://brandedmayhem.com).

Pair with `ap playground`. See https://github.com/pattern-stack/agentic-patterns-ts/blob/main/docs/CLAUDE-CODE-PLUGIN-ACTIVATION.md for activation + troubleshooting.

entries.title: total-recall
entries.description: Cross-session, cross-CLI memory for AI coding assistants. Mines transcripts from 10 supported CLI clients. Surfaces operator identity / decisions / bans / corrections / goals / voice via 26 MCP tools, 6 hooks (SessionStart signpost + SessionStart compact-restore + UserPromptSubmit retrieval + Stop/PostCompact re-index + PreCompact continuity-seed), 15 slash commands, and 3 skills. gte-modernbert hybrid recall; worktree-aware project scoping; post-compaction coding-continuity packet. Optional local-LLM refinement ([llm] extra, ollama, off by default). The operator becomes the source of truth; the model stops re-asking what they already told it.

entries.title: interactive-diagram

Tabbed multi-view, pan / zoom / drag, connected-chain highlight, double-click pin, dark mode (Tokyo Night), overlap auto-fix, and SVG / PNG export. Plus a static, slide-ready platform-architecture poster mode with a built-in overflow / overlap audit, one-click auto-fix, and download-fixed-HTML.

Bundles the install-promptworld deploy WIZARD (the agent builds the docker image, boots the container running the Engineer-CEO + PromptGym + the assistant-ui chat / Monaco file explorer / embedded terminal, copies the Claude creds in, and hands the user one URL), compile-a-world (the meta-compiler skill — the nomicon folds on itself), and ingest-into-nomicon-app.

entries.description: The framework client-facing teams use to build internal and client apps with AI. Two agents (Product Owner + AI Developer) run a disciplined spec-to-deploy lifecycle, packaged with FuseBase Apps domain skills. Closes the gaps that break real AI app development: drift, context rot, scope creep, unreliable hand-offs.

entries.title: arboretum
entries.description: Choreography for AI-assisted software development. Defers heavy lifting to specialists like superpowers; provides governance, workflows, and templates that produce maintainable projects.

entries.title: luminaries
entries.description: Paired-thinker review lenses for design review and code audit. Each pair fuses two software-engineering thinkers into one stereo lens held in tension on an axis (e.g. structure × runtime); aim it at a design, spec, PR, diff, or repo. Routes by subject, stage, and intent; runs as a single best-fit pair, a multi-pair panel that fans out one lens per axis and collates, or a single-luminary anchor lookup.

entries.title: daisyui
entries.description: Official daisyUI component library skill. The mandatory UI library for Tailwind CSS. TRIGGER when generating any HTML or JSX code even if the user does not explicitly ask for this skill.

entries.title: wikify
entries.description: Turn a folder of documents into a navigable, evidence-grounded wiki, with corpus and wiki MCP search tools.

entries.title: pact-kit
entries.description: 24 Pact/KDA-CE skills, 16 instructions, 20 slash commands, 1 security agent, and CI scripts for Kadena smart contract development.

entries.title: fabric-skills
entries.description: Complete bundle: all Microsoft Skills for Fabric for developers and consumers

entries.title: soapbox-agent
entries.description: Soapbox core sustainability intelligence — RSRA, CRREM pathways, retrofit advisor, and report template engine. Skills, agents, and MCP tools for real estate sustainability teams.

entries.title: fpp-forecast
entries.description: Zaman serisi tahminlemesini 'Forecasting: Principles and Practice, the Pythonic Way' metodolojisiyle yapar. Teşhis-önce, kıyas-zorunlu, nokta+aralık. Paralel mimari: orkestratör + isimli agent'lar (teşhisçi, model-işçisi fan-out, birleştirici). Çıktı: çalıştırılabilir .ipynb + Türkçe sonuç raporu.

entries.title: delegate-team
entries.description: Agentic engineering supersystem — install once, run /mavis-ship "<task>" or dt run "<task>" anywhere. Bundles the /mavis-ship orchestrator, multi-agent team framework, skill scaffolder, agent-kernel (memory + governance), and four companion frameworks (superpowers, Waza, unslop-preflight, autoresearch) on top of the original dt gateway CLI.

entries.title: spreadx-matrix
entries.description: Operate a SpreadX account from your agent — balance, orders, follow & like/retweet/comment plans, plan tracking, and redeeming credits for subscriptions — via the spreadx MCP server, with a dry-run→confirm safety protocol.

entries.title: consulting-os
entries.description: Skills for running an AI consulting practice operating system.

entries.title: ai-mentor
entries.description: Describe your engineering problem, get the right AI workflow. Ranked, verified recommendations with ready-to-paste prompts that teach you why each approach works — not just how.

entries.title: operator-user-docs
entries.description: Claude Code skills for generating, branding (OKD), and validating OpenShift operator user-facing documentation

entries.title: claude-code-themes
entries.description: Accessible, OKLCH-built color themes for Claude Code — tuned for readable contrast and easy on the eyes.

entries.title: pdd
entries.description: PDD (Parity-Driven Development) — framework para refactor/rewrite/port de sistemas legados com paridade comportamental rastreável: evidência objetiva (score de confiança + harness de comparação), testes de caracterização, QA como portão de merge, PR-dossiê e painel de progresso.

entries.title: vibefullness
entries.description: Always-on output discipline: every response cheap to read and cheap to verify. Composes with caveman.

entries.title: trivy-plugin-vdr-skills
entries.description: Agent skills that generate the operator-attested ConfigMaps consumed by trivy-plugin-vdr for FedRAMP VDR/VER: cluster dataflow capture (internet-reachability taint graph) and asset-archetype/Class attestations.

entries.title: chrome-devtools-mcp
entries.description: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entries.title: beantr
entries.description: Manage a personal coffee inventory, brew log, recipes, and recommendations through Markdown files instead of an API or database.

entries.title: unihttp
entries.description: Skills for writing idiomatic unihttp clients and generating typed unihttp client packages (SDKs)

entries.title: plumb-line
entries.description: Give any repository the discipline of epistemic honesty enforced by tooling: a clear source-truth layer, visible uncertainty, quarantined fakery, reproducible outputs, and rules enforced by machines rather than goodwill.

entries.title: ego-avatar
entries.description: Kaiju Ego Avatar: Token-saving AI persona with Gluttony and Aura skills

entries.title: delphin
entries.description: Duplex companion for AI agent CLIs — keep talking while the agent thinks, and recall every conversation. Skill: recall Delphin's local memory, or build/run the wrapper.

entries.title: hotwire-codex-skills
entries.description: Unofficial skillset inspired by The Rails and Hotwire Codex (by Ayush Newatia), published with the author's permission. Skills and runnable checkers for Rails + Hotwire apps that ship to web/PWA, iOS, and Android. Unique vs other Rails plugins (which are LLM coders/reviewers): every skill ships a deterministic, CI-runnable linter that flags the failures that produce no error. Covers Hotwire Native bridge components and path config (cross-platform web+iOS+Android), Rails 7→8 upgrade with the LazyRouteSet route-test flake detector, Turbo 8 morphing, Turbo Frames with a dangling-target / duplicate-id linter, targeted Turbo Streams with a broadcast-eavesdropping linter, DB-backed token session auth with a security audit, and Turbo-safe Stimulus patterns.

entries.title: delivery-graph
entries.description: Delivery Graph Engineering: turn demands into validated delivery graphs. Ships the /dge-* skills and the dge CLI.

entries.title: claude-agent-team
entries.description: Subagents, slash commands, and Unity game-development skills for Claude Code. The Unity skills cover C# architecture, the Editor MCP feedback loop, testing, asset/serialization safety, performance, UI Toolkit, and builds.

entries.title: second-opinion
entries.description: Interrogates the decisions behind AI-written code, not just its correctness: whether this was the right path, whether the business logic is sound, and what it will cost to own. Produces a decision review for a human, or a machine-readable verdict for an approving agent.

entries.title: dependabot-reviewer
entries.description: Review, verify, and fix open Dependabot and ospo-renovate PRs across all GitHub hosts you are authenticated with. Approves safe updates, sets automerge, updates branches, flags PRs requiring manual action, and autonomously fixes merge conflicts and failing CI.

entries.title: hse-core
entries.description: NZ/AU workplace health & safety Claude Agent Skills — an orchestrator plus specialists for critical risk, governance, NZ/AU duties, high-risk work, investigation and procedures, and prosecution learning; a full tier of hazard subject-matter experts; equipment/plant specialists (cranes, forklifts, lifting & rigging, EWPs, scaffolding, pressure equipment); and sector specialists spanning construction, transport & logistics, manufacturing, food processing, agriculture, horticulture, forestry, electricity supply, geothermal, oil & gas, mining & quarrying, fishing & aquaculture, maritime & ports, healthcare, waste & recycling, rail, hospitality and more.

entries.title: coding-crew
entries.description: A collection of coding skills for project structure, testing, API layers, and design workflows.

entries.title: beaver
entries.description: Skills for product definition, system design, software architecture, specs, and verification — structure before code. Bundles defining-products, designing-systems, architecting-software, specifying-features, crafting-code, and verifying-completion.

entries.title: iterate-team
entries.description: agent team 並列マルチエージェント・ハーネス。要望文から計画を作成し、独立タスクを git worktree で分離して並列実装、検収は Evaluator 先行→APPROVED 後に Code Review の逐次ゲート、PR を自動作成する。言語・スタック非依存。

entries.title: seyfert
entries.description: Source-verified Seyfert v5 guidance for building Discord bots with Claude Code & Codex

entries.title: autoharness
entries.description: Per-symbol maintenance optimizer for an agent's skill layer — learns skills from real runs and keeps them by adherence in use, not by an offline eval score.

entries.title: skillbooks
entries.description: AI-executed skills for logged-in site access (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, Reddit, Airbnb, Otter, and more), travel and award search, editorial review, and source-cited research.

entries.title: hypo
entries.description: LLM-native personal wiki system — session-aware knowledge base for Claude Code

entries.title: mad
entries.description: mad (MultiAgent Decanting) — orquestração multi-agente em modo decanting nativo do Claude Code. O Arquiteto coordena especialistas via Agent tool (sem claude -p, sem processos em background); cada feature é uma sessão viva que externaliza aprendizado obrigatoriamente ao fim (decanting). Memória institucional em arquivo, trust ladder por agente, guardrails proporcionais ao blast radius, dashboard HTML local cross-platform e telemetria OpenTelemetry GenAI. Thin wrapper sobre Claude Code: Windows nativo, macOS e Linux.

entries.title: todomaker
entries.description: Manage TodoMaker project todos from Claude Code: check pending tasks for the current repo, add tasks and projects. Bundles the TodoMaker MCP server (auto-registered on install) and a usage skill.

entries.title: nicopowers
entries.description: Nico's personal engineering-process skills: brainstorming, planning, TDD, systematic debugging, verification, code review, git worktrees, and skill authoring.

entries.title: 1ai-skills
entries.description: 1320 production-ready AI agent skills — cybersecurity, SEO, trading, marketing, automation, devops, content, financial services, and more

entries.title: for-developers-plugin
entries.description: A friendly companion for getting an app running on the Intility Developer Platform. Helps you create a cluster, deploy a containerized app, expose it on a URL, and update it later — without needing prior Kubernetes experience.

entries.title: seeks
entries.description: Self-running, verifier-gated loops with durable .seeks/ state and native worktrees.

entries.title: cursor-bridge
entries.description: MCP server: 从 Claude Code 直驱 Cursor IDE 的 agent 做语义代码检索（CDP 直驱，无 console 注入）。

entries.title: compliance-support
entries.description: A Claude Code plugin for engineers who write PCI cardholder-data code. It blocks hardcoded secrets and weak crypto as the code is written, and reviews changed code for PII in logs and money-moving actions with no audit trail when the turn ends.

entries.title: genius-skills
entries.description: Personal agent skills for PR review, commits, debugging, and more

entries.title: tetsu-skills
entries.description: A collection of Claude Code skills by tetsuro.

entries.title: software-engineer
entries.description: Multi-agent Claude Code plugin that automates the full software development lifecycle — database → backend → frontend → testing → security scan → git commit. Each domain agent keeps its own knowledge base and learns across sessions. Uses the host IDE's models (orchestrator on the main model, mechanical sub-agents on cheaper models); no API keys or local Ollama required.

entries.title: outset
entries.description: Create, edit, and launch Outset research studies and query interview results — connects to Outset's remote MCP server (OAuth login with your Outset account).

entries.title: firefox-devtools-mcp
entries.description: Control Firefox for browsing, web testing, and debugging. Fill forms, capture network and console activity, take screenshots, run scripts, and profile performance. Supports Android devices.
